02 About

I'm a Computer Science student and full-stack developer from Olongapo City who likes owning the whole build — the screens people tap and the systems humming behind them. I've shipped an AI health app, a rental platform for a real client, and an award-winning heritage kiosk, and I sweat the small details that make software feel finished.

When I'm not building, I mentor students in robotics competitions and spend time with the people I care about — and I'm always chipping away at the next thing to learn. Right now that's React.
